rawMarkdown:
--- source: https://developer.apple.com/documentation/SiriEventSuggestionsMarkup/@context crawled: 2026-03-10T21:50:07Z --- # @context **Type** The open standard reference for interpreting the markup contents. ## Declaration ```swift string @context ``` ## Overview For JSON-LD, the `@context` for a reservation should always be `http://schema.org`, as in this example: ```xml ``` For Microdata, provide the URL as part of the `itemtype`, as in this example: ```xml
Your reservation ASDF1234 is confirmed! /* more data goes here */
``` ## Basic Data Types - **dateTimeISO8601**: A time and date in the ISO-8601 format. - **reservationId**: A stable, unique identifier for the reservation. - **reservationStatus**: A string indicating that the reservation has been confirmed or canceled. - **URL**: The address of a webpage. - **telephone**: A phone number.

items.description: A time and date in the ISO-8601 format.

items.description: A string indicating that the reservation has been confirmed or canceled.

title: @context
